Why Choose Us

What Makes Sean Different 🌟

We do not just drop and run

🚚

Full Setup Included

Sean delivers, inflates, stakes down, and safety-checks every castle. No extra fees, no DIY.

⏱️

Always On Time

If your party starts at 2pm, the castle is ready before your first guest arrives. Non-negotiable.

🧼

Spotless Castles

Every castle is cleaned after every hire. You always get a fresh, well-maintained inflatable.

📞

Talk to a Real Person

No bots, no email queues. Call or text Sean directly and get a straight answer straight away.

The Process

Dead Easy to Book ✅

Four steps from enquiry to bouncing

Step 01
📞

Give Sean a Ring

Call or text 086 855 0485. Tell Sean your date and which castle caught your eye.

Step 02
🚚

We Deliver

Sean arrives well before your guests, sets everything up, and does a full safety check.

Step 03
🎉

Kids Go Wild

Sit back and enjoy the party. The kids will have the absolute time of their lives.

Step 04
📦

We Collect

Once the party is over Sean comes back and takes everything away. Zero hassle for you.

Our Castles 🏰

Eight setups, all delivered, inflated, and ready to bounce. Click any photo to view full screen

Total Wipeout

Our flagship 40ft camo obstacle course. Climb the ladder, crawl through tunnels, and slide down the other side. The crown jewel of the fleet.

Call for priceAges 5+

Total Wipeout (Slide View)

A closer look at the towering slide section of the Total Wipeout. The height of this thing has to be seen to be believed.

Call for priceAges 5+

Total Wipeout (Full Run)

The full 40ft bird's-eye view. You need space but once this is set up on your field it is the centrepiece of any event.

Call for priceAges 5+

Disco Dome

Lights, music, and dancing inside an inflatable. The Disco Dome is completely one of a kind and always the talk of the event.

Call for priceAll ages

Circus Circus

Yellow and blue with clown panels and a built-in slide. The perfect castle for younger kids who want plenty of colour and fun.

Call for priceAges 2-10

Superheroes Combo

Blue and orange with action hero panels all round. An absolute birthday party crowd-pleaser for any kid who loves their superheroes.

Call for priceAges 3-12

Party Obstacle Course

Pink, purple and blue obstacle run. Massive fun in the sun and one of the most popular setups on a summer weekend.

Call for priceAges 4-14

Party Course (Blue Edition)

The darker blue take on our party obstacle course. Same brilliant run, different vibe. Great for mixed age groups and bigger gardens.

Call for priceAges 4-14

Questions

FAQs 💬

Quick answers to the most common questions

Most castles need a flat area of at least 5m x 5m. We will ask for your measurements when you book to make sure everything fits safely before we arrive.
Light rain is usually fine. For heavy rain or high winds we may need to reschedule for safety. Sean will always call you well in advance if there is any concern.
Yes. Delivery, setup, and collection within the Dublin area is all included. A small mileage charge may apply for longer distances and we will always quote you upfront.
Standard hire is a full day. Weekend and multi-day hires are available at great rates. Just let Sean know when you are enquiring and he will sort it out.
Yes, the castles need a standard mains socket nearby to run the blower. If you are in a field or away from mains power, let Sean know and he can advise on options.

About Sean 👋

The man behind the castles. A bit about who you are booking with and why families keep coming back.

Bouncy Castles R U

Bouncy Castles R U is run by Sean Neill, an Irish bouncy castle hire operator who has built a reputation on one simple principle: show up on time, set up properly, and make the kids smile.

Sean started out with a single castle and a van. The fleet has grown since then but the approach has not changed. Every booking gets the same attention, every castle is cleaned between hires, and every customer gets Sean's personal number so they can reach him directly, any time.

Whether it is a backyard birthday party for ten kids or a school fete with hundreds running around, Sean treats every event the same. The details matter.

Our Values

What We Stand For

🤝

Reliability

When you book a date, that date is locked in. Sean has never missed a booking and is not about to start.

🧼

Quality

Every castle is cleaned, inspected, and maintained after every single hire. You always get a castle in top condition.

💬

Honesty

Straight answers, upfront pricing, no hidden charges. What Sean quotes you is what you pay. Simple as that.

❤️

Care

Sean genuinely loves what he does. Seeing kids absolutely losing themselves on a bouncy castle never gets old.
